Designing Simplified Digital Experiences, One Interface At A Time.

Helping startups and growing brands turn complex ideas into clear, intuitive digital products.

INTRODUCTION

A Glimpse Into My World

Hi, I'm Aesha

A UI/UX and Visual Designer with 4+ years of experience shaping digital products and web experiences for startups and small businesses. With a background in optometry, I bring a unique sensitivity to how people see, scan, and interact with interfaces.

This perspective informs how I structure layouts, typography, and interaction patterns to improve readability, reduce friction, and create calm, intuitive experiences. I work across product design, interface systems, and front-end collaboration helping teams transform complex ideas into clear, usable products that grow over time.

From early exploration to final delivery, my focus is always the same: design that works for users, teams, and long-term products.

Client Projects
30
Design Deliverables
4+
Years of Experience
[Portfolio Image]
PROCESS & WORKFLOW

Crafting Design Solutions With Precision & Clarity

Every brand has a story. I translate that story into design systems that are clear, strategic, & results-driven. My UI/UX process focuses on usability, visual harmony, & measurable impact.

Discovery

Understanding your business, users, and goals.

Strategy

Defining structure, flows, and visual direction.

Execution

Crafting intuitive UI, layouts, and interactions.

Refinement

Testing, feedback, and final design delivery.

FEATURED PROJECTS

Designs That Move The Needle

Transforming ideas into powerful visual narratives that drive results

Website Design

TESTIMONIALS

Client Voices

Real stories of transformation through design and strategic thinking.

★★★★★
"Aesha's creativity brought our vision to life beautifully. She understood the cinematic tone we wanted and translated it into a clean, immersive website experience. The final design feels elegant, intuitive, and truly reflects our work."
Siddhesh S.
Filmmaker
★★★★★
"Working with Aesha was a smooth and collaborative experience. She quickly understood our brand and turned our ideas into a clear, polished website design. Her attention to detail and visual sense made a huge difference."

Venus Games & Electronics
★★★★★
"Aesha doesn't just design, she creates an entire mood and visual language for the project. The design felt thoughtful, balanced, and incredibly refined. It elevated how our brand is perceived online."
